name: ProcessCheckExtr_EE

text.value: WITH cte_db2_RUN_CYCLE AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' UNION SELECT SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' UNION SELECT SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SourceSys}') , cte_Trans1 AS (SELECT SUBJ_CD AS SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD AS TRGT_SYS_CD FROM cte_db2_RUN_CYCLE) SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD FROM cte_Trans1

Job Name:
